body:
Because "highest-rated" can depend on which platform you look at (and rankings frequently update based on recent reviews), there isn't a single, definitive technician crowned as the absolute best. However, several highly rated garage door service companies consistently top the local charts in San Ramon, CA based on customer feedback across Google, Yelp, and Thumbtack:

### 1\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

  * **The Reputation:** One of the most reviewed and highly rated choices serving San Ramon, maintaining an average near 4.8 stars with hundreds of reviews.

  * **Standout Technicians:** Customers frequently praise individual technicians by name for their punctuality, friendliness, and lack of aggressive upselling. Specifically, **Carlos Larios** , **Jose Brizuela** , and **Patrick Leahy** are repeatedly highlighted in local reviews for their stellar service and quick turnarounds on broken springs and motor installations. [Garage Door Repair Reviews in San Ramon, CA (Updated June 2026)](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/san-ramon#:~:text=In%20addition%20to%20the%20door,Precision%20Garage%20Door%20and%20Carlos.)

### 2\. Right Way Garage Doors

  * **The Reputation:** Operating in the San Ramon area since 1980, this company has built massive local trust over four decades. [San Ramon, CA's Garage Door Experts Since 1980](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/san-ramon/#:~:text=The%20city%20of%20San%20Ramon,replace%20garage%20doors%20and%20motors.)

  * **Why They Rank High:** They are well-known for bringing a "mobile showroom" directly to your house if you are looking to upgrade, and their service pros are heavily praised for same-day emergency repairs. [San Ramon, CA's Garage Door Experts Since 1980](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/san-ramon/#:~:text=Are%20you%20looking%20to%20upgrade,garage%20door%20showroom%20on%20wheels!)

### 3\. Local Garage Doors

  * **The Reputation:** Boasts perfect 5-star ratings across Yelp, Google, and Thumbtack.

  * **Why They Rank High:** They are a go-to choice for homeowners in the Dougherty Valley and custom home communities because of their transparent pricing, thorough maintenance tune-ups, and swift response times.

### 4\. B & C Garage Door Co. Inc.

  * **The Reputation:** Headquartered right in San Ramon on Escobar Place, they have been a local fixture since 1979.

  * **Why They Rank High:** As a homegrown local business, they are highly rated for emergency 24-hour dispatch and getting repairs done right on the first visit.

> **Tip:** If you are dealing with a trapped car or a broken torsion spring, **Precision** and **Local Garage Doors** typically have the largest fleet of technicians nearby for immediate, same-day scheduling.

What kind of garage door issue are you trying to get fixed?
